title: Generating Synthetic Training Data
concept: When real training data is rare or expensive, a trained GAN can generate synthetic images to augment the dataset.

exercises.explain: Without enough diverse training photos, AI models struggle to recognize objects accurately in the real world.

options.text: It makes the computer run much faster
The AI will struggle to recognize new or rare objects
The AI will automatically download images from the internet

exercises.prompt: Why is having too few training images a problem for AI?

cards.body: Imagine training an AI to detect rare medical conditions, but only having three patient scans to show it. How do you teach a machine without enough data? You let a GAN invent new, realistic training examples!
cards.title: The Empty Library

cards.body: Synthetic data generation is the process of using a trained generative model (like a GAN) to create realistic, fake data samples to fill gaps in a training dataset.
cards.title: Synthetic Data
The Flight Simulator
cards.body: Think of synthetic data like flight simulators for pilots. We don't want to crash real planes just to practice emergencies. Instead, we use simulated flights to safely experience and learn from rare situations!

A self-driving car AI needs to learn how to drive in rare, heavy blizzards. Instead of waiting for real snowstorms, engineers use a GAN to generate thousands of realistic snowy road images to train the car's sensors safely.
cards.title: Driving in the Snow
Not Just Copy-Pasting
cards.body: People often think synthetic data is just copying and pasting real photos. In reality, a good GAN creates completely new, unique images that capture the patterns of real data without duplicating it!

left.text: AI gets confused by rare angles or lighting.

right.text: Thousands of synthetic variations teach the AI to be robust.

exercises.explain: Synthetic data allows us to expand small datasets so AI models can learn patterns from rare cases without needing millions of real photos.

options.text: It deletes unnecessary real photos to save computer storage.
It creates realistic, fake images to expand limited datasets.
It instantly makes any AI model 100% accurate without training.

exercises.prompt: What is the main purpose of generating synthetic training data?
True or False: Synthetic data is highly useful for training AI on dangerous or rare events.
exercises.explain: Synthetic data can be created to represent rare scenarios that are difficult or unsafe to capture in real life.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word: When real photos are too rare, we use a GAN to create ________ data for training.
exercises.explain: Synthetic data helps fill the gaps when gathering real-world data is too difficult or expensive.
exercises.sentence: When real photos are too rare, we use a GAN to create synthetic data for training.

options.text: Scenario A: A hospital hires photographers to take pictures of patients.
Scenario B: A researcher uses a GAN to generate 5,000 realistic images of rare skin conditions to train a diagnostic tool.

exercises.explain: Scenario B uses a generative model to create fake training samples, which is the definition of generating synthetic training data.
exercises.prompt: Which scenario demonstrates generating synthetic training data?

exercises.explain: Synthetic data allows AIs to learn from thousands of variations of rare scenarios, making them much more robust. Next, we will explore how synthetic data helps preserve user privacy.
exercises.prompt: How does synthetic data improve the performance of a machine learning model?

options.text: It allows the model to learn from a wide variety of simulated rare scenarios
It forces the AI to memorize the exact real photos we already have
It replaces the need to write any code for the AI system
